data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Strong encryption is used for data at rest and in transit to protect customer data.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Robust IAM policies control user access and permissions.
data.technical_spec: AWS IAM roles, policies, and MFA.

data.title: Threat Detection and Monitoring
data.description: Constant monitoring for suspicious activity to quickly respond to threats.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Systems in place to mitigate distributed denial-of-service attacks.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Well-defined protocols to quickly address and manage incidents.
data.technical_spec: Defined escalation paths and response protocols.
